summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by the redesigned LoginPage showing both User Login and Admin Login cards simultaneously on initial load. REQ-2 is addressed by the post-OTP redirect logic that checks admin status and profile existence to route to /admin/dashboard, /dashboard, or /register. REQ-3 is addressed by the Navbar using a showAdminLinks derived boolean that only renders admin links when the user is authenticated, admin check is complete, and isAdmin is true.
